# Elessar ◆

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Leadership

*Title.*

---

Attach to a **_Noble_** hero or Aragorn. Attached character gains the **_Gondor_** trait. If attached character is Aragorn, he gains the **_Noble_** trait.
**Action**: Exhaust Elessar to choose an ally that is defending an attack and shares a **_Trait_** with the attached character. Either ready that ally or give it +1 DEF for that attack.

---

> *“Say not The Lords of Gondor. Say The King Elessar.”*
> —Prince Imrahil, The Return of the King

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Blood in the Isen]] #185
